fund_type: An open-ended equity investment strategy investing in listed equity and equity related instruments including limited short exposure in equity through derivative instruments.
scheme_objective: To generate medium to long term capital appreciation by investing in listed equity and equity related instruments including limited short exposure in equity through derivative instruments. However, there is no assurance that the investment objective of the Investment strategy will be achieved.

asset_allocation.allocation_type: Equity and Equity related instruments and Equity Derivatives
Short exposure through unhedged derivative position in equity and equity related instruments
Debt and money market instruments including fixed income derivatives

growth.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Regular Growth

payout.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Regular IDCW Payout

reinvestment.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Regular IDCW Reinvestment

growth.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Direct Growth

payout.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Direct IDCW Payout

reinvestment.name: Titanium Equity Long-Short Fund Direct IDCW Reinvestment

fund_managers.name: 1 Suraj Nanda, FM-2 Amit Somani; FM-3 Hasmukh Devji Vishariya
fund_managers.type: 1 Primary, FM-2 Primary, FM-3 Primary (Overseaes Investment)

investment_limits.minimum_application_amount: The minimum aggregate investment by an investor across all investment strategies offered by Titanium SIF, at the Permanent Account Number (‘PAN’) level, shall not be less than INR 10 lakh. Provided that the requirement of minimum investment amount shall not apply to an accredited investor.
investment_limits.minimum_redemption_amount:
500
The redemption will be subject to compliance with provisions mentioned under “Minimum investment threshold”

exit_load:
1. Redemption/Switch-out on or before expiry of 1 month from the date of allotment: 1%
2. Redemption/Switch-out after expiry of 1 month from the date of allotment-Nil
